# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment for our batch processing jobs. The pods run data processing tasks and don't need to interact with the Kubernetes API. Use default service account settings for simplicity. Focus on getting the jobs running reliably.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: batch-processing
  labels:
    app: batch-processing
    component: data-pipeline
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: batch-processing
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: batch-processing
        component: data-pipeline
    spec:
      # Since pods don't need Kubernetes API access, explicitly disable it
      automountServiceAccountToken: false
      containers:
        - name: data-processor
          image: batch-processor:1.0.0
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: "500m"
              memory: "512Mi"
            limits:
              cpu: "2000m"
              memory: "2Gi"
          securityContext:
            runAsNonRoot: true
            runAsUser: 1000
            runAsGroup: 1000
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
          volumeMounts:
            - name: tmp-volume
              mountPath: /tmp
            - name: data-volume
              mountPath: /data
          env:
            - name: BATCH_CONCURRENCY
              value: "4"
            - name: LOG_LEVEL
              value: "info"
          livenessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - /bin/sh
                - -c
                - pgrep -f data-processor
            initialDelaySeconds: 30
            periodSeconds: 60
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
          readinessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - /bin/sh
                - -c
                - test -f /tmp/ready
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 15
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 3
      volumes:
        - name: tmp-volume
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 500Mi
        - name: data-volume
          emptyDir:
            sizeLimit: 5Gi
      restartPolicy: Always
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 120
